title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build and maintain scalable web applications using React and Node.js.

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Develop cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter or React Native.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure on AWS.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze large datasets and build predictive models using Python.

title: QA Engineer
description: Design and execute automated and manual test cases.

title: Product Manager
description: Define product roadmap and coordinate with cross-functional teams.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor systems and prevent security breaches.

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Develop machine learning models and AI-powered solutions.

title: UI Designer
description: Create user-centered designs and interactive prototypes.

title: System Administrator
description: Maintain IT systems, servers, and network infrastructure.
